texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Issue 2: Text-mode escapes in math context
texts.text: Issue 2: Text-mode escapes in math context

texts.label: text
texts.orig:
The equation below uses U+2013 EN DASH as minus and U+005E as caret.
Expected LaTeX: x - y^2
Docling produces: x \text{ \textendash } y\text{ \textasciicircum }2

Both characters appear inside <m:r><m:t> math runs but are escaped as text-mode LaTeX macros instead of kept as math operators.
texts.text:
